product_name: Gyeon Q² Leather Coat Redefined Deri Yüzeyler Için Bakım ve Koruma - 400 ml

sources.cleaned_content:
Q² LEATHERCOAT REDEFINED

Interior / coating

Semi-aniline and nappa protectant

Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED is an easy-to-use leather sealant designed to protect modern automotive leather. After proper cleaning, it is applied in a single, even layer to create a hydrophobic barrier that protects leather against liquids, sweat, dirt, and dye transfer from clothing. The coating leaves an invisible layer that does not change the look or feel of the leather.

Easy to use leather sealant.
Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED helps preserve the original appearance of leather upholstery by protecting it from daily contamination and UV exposure. It simplifies maintenance and keeps leather looking clean and factory matte for longer.

Features:
- UV PROTECTION
- FOR ALL TYPES OF LEATHER
- EASY MAINTENANCE

What makes Q2 LEATHERCOAT REDEFINED so special?
- Hydrophobic protection against liquids, dirt and sweat
- Helps prevent discolouration and dye transfer

TECHNICAL DETAILS:
- CAPACITIES: 120 ML / 500 ML
- Real World Lifespan: >3 months
- BARRIER AGAINST LIQUID: YES
- SURFACE: EVERY LEATHER

HOW TO USE:
01 - Clean the leather thoroughly before application.
02 - Apply the product to a soft microfibre cloth or applicator.
03 - Spread evenly over the leather surface.
04 - Allow the product to be absorbed by the leather.
05 - Wipe off any visual residue.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS:

What type of leather is Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED suitable for?
It is designed primarily for semi-aniline and nappa automotive leather.

Does it change the look or feel of the leather?
No. It leaves an invisible layer with a factory matte finish.

How long does the protection last?
Over three months, depending on use and conditions.

Does it protect against dye transfer from clothing?
Yes, it will help to some extent reduce staining on jeans and other fabrics. For maximum protection against such contamination, Q² LeatherShield is best.

Is proper cleaning required before application?
Yes. Clean leather is essential for good bonding and performance.

Recommended Pairing:
- Q²M LEATHERCLEANER NATURAL (500 ML / 1000 ML) - Light, daily leather cleaner for well maintained leather.
- Q²M MF APPLICATOR EVO 2-PACK (120x95x25 mm) - Soft and ergonomic microfibre applicators.
- Q²M LEATHERBRUSH - A fully natural, safe leather brush with an ergonomically designed handle.
- Q²M LEATHERWIPE EVO (40x40 cm) - The low pile, edgeless Q²M LeatherWipe EVO is gentle yet absorbant.
- Q² LEATHERSHIELD EVO (50 ML / 100 ML) - Advanced leather protection.

sources.page_title: GYEON Q² LeatherCoat | SiO₂ Leather Sealant
sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON - Q² LeatherCoat

Rating: 7 reviews

GYEON Q² LeatherCoat is a quick, breathable SiO₂ leather sealant that adds hydrophobic, UV and dye-transfer resistance. Wipe-on protection with a clean OEM-matte feel for modern coated leather.

Price:
- 120ml: £6.50 (Ex VAT: £5.42) - Stock: 6
- 400ml: £24.00 - Stock: 16

Brand: GYEON

In Stock. Order now for delivery on Tuesday, 10th February. (Select Next Day Delivery at checkout.)

GYEON Q² LeatherCoat — Breathable SiO₂ leather sealant

Gyeon Q2 Leather is a dedicated sealant for leather that bonds strongly to the surface, but doesn't effect the look or feel of even the softest leather.

Just one layer of Gyeon Q2 Leather Coat ensures a high level of protection as the coating itself is hydrophobic and repels both liquids and dirt. It also provides strong protection against UV rays, allowing you to keep the freshness of colours for a long time, even in hot and sunny conditions.

As most modern interior automotive leather has a factory matt finish, we made sure that Gyeon Q2 Leather Coat leaves an invisible layer that does not affect the look or feel of the soft leather trim in any way. It simply coats the leather to ensure its good looks remain the same as the day you bought it.

Gyeon Q2 LeatherCoat is designed to protect leather trim for the maximum possible time by protecting it from dirt, sweat, salt and fats. Its hydrophobic properties and strong bonding to the surface help to protect against pollutants that may penetrate the structure of your trim. Gyeon Q2 LeatherCoat also protects against any discoloration resulting from contact with leather belts, jackets or jeans.

Gyeon Q2 LeatherCoat is very easy to use, it just requires proper cleaning of the leather prior to ensure good bond, then simply apply to a soft microfibre cloth or applicator and wipe over in an even layer. With durability of up to 3 months this hydrophobic coating provides protection from liquids, sweat, dirt and also 'dye transfer' from jeans and clothing that can discolour and stain leather.

Features & Benefits:
- Easy to use, spray on formula
- Flexible coating bonds to leather to provide a hydrophobic protective layer
- Liquid spills are repelled, reducing the chances of staining
- Abrasion resistant
- Non-sticky formula will not attract dust & dirt
- Contains UV inhibitors - prevents colour fade
- pH neutral formulation - safe for all leather (colour fastness patch test recommended)
- Lasts up to 3 months

Available in 120ml & 400ml bottles with sprayer

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat | Silica-Based Leather Protectant — Polished Bliss
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat

Brand: Gyeon

Price:
- 120 ml: £6.50
- 400 ml: £24.00

Availability: Only 6 left!

We Say:
When it comes to maintaining the elegance and longevity of leather surfaces in our vehicles or homes, we can't overlook the importance of using a high-quality leather protection product. Enter Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat, a groundbreaking solution that has caught our attention—and for good reason.

At its core, Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat is engineered to provide an unparalleled level of protection for leather materials. This product utilises advanced nanotechnology, which forms a durable, hydrophobic layer on the leather surface. This means that not only does it repel water, but it also helps prevent dirt and grime from settling in—keeping your leather looking pristine for longer.

One of the standout features of Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat is its ability to maintain the natural feel and appearance of leather. Unlike some other treatments that can leave a greasy residue, Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat is designed to be non-greasy and transparent, ensuring that your leather retains its original texture and character.

The magic of Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat lies in its formulation. Using a combination of specialised resins and polymers, this product creates a protective barrier that bonds with the leather. This bond not only offers protection against everyday wear and tear but also enhances the leather's resistance to UV rays, which can cause fading over time.

Additionally, the hydrophobic properties of this leather coat mean that spills and stains can be easily wiped away without the worry of permanent damage. Whether it's coffee, soda, or a stray pet paw, Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat helps you stay one step ahead of potential mishaps.

Using Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat is straightforward. Simply clean the leather surface thoroughly, apply the coating evenly, and allow it to cure.

Key Features:
- Adds Protection: Yes (Silica-Based)
- Durability: 2 Months + (Average Value)
- Shine Level: 4/10 (Single Coat)

Description:
Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat is a functional silica-based coating that forms a protective barrier layer on modern leather upholstery. It uses low-volatile silicon (Si) technology to lay down a film of dimethylsiloxane polymers that condense rapidly to form a flexible SiO2 coating with a lifespan of up to three months. Following application, treated surfaces actively repel liquids and other contaminants (including sweat and dye transfer), making them easier to clean and maintain. In addition, Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat also blocks out harmful UV radiation from the sun, thus helping to prevent the leather from fading over time.

Specification:
- Adds Protection: Yes
- Chemical Basis: Silica-based
- Contains UV Absorbers: Yes
- Durability: 2 months +
- Emits Strong Fumes: No
- Shine Level: 4
- Stain Resistant: Yes
- Suitable For: Leather surfaces (finished only)

How To Use:
Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat should be applied in a warm dry place out of direct sunlight. To protect your skin, we recommend wearing PB Nitrile Gloves during the application process.

In all cases, firstly clean the surfaces you are going to treat with either Gyeon Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural or Gyeon Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong and allow them to dry fully before continuing. To apply Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat, lightly wet a Meguiar's Even Coat Microfiber Applicator Pad with product and wipe it in evenly, using light pressure and overlapping strokes (aim to finish up with a thin, even layer). Once all of the surfaces are treated, leave them to dry naturally for a minimum of two hours before sitting in the car.

GYEON Q2 LeatherCoat Redefined

Brand: Gyeon
SKU: GY2LC00120R20

Sizes & Prices:
- Redefined / 120ml: £8.00
- Redefined / 500ml: £24.00

Stock: In stock

Pickup available from Unit 3, Redan Hill Industrial Estate, GU12 4SJ - Usually ready in 1 hour

Gyeon Q² LeatherCoat Redefined

This user-friendly, hydrophobic sealant offers up to 3 months of protection against liquids, sweat, dirt, and even light dye transfer from clothing that can discolour and stain your leather.

Why You'll Love Q² LeatherCoat:
- Long-Lasting Hydrophobic Barrier: A single layer provides exceptional protection, repelling liquids and dirt to prevent stains.
- Powerful UV Protection: Shields leather from the sun, keeping colours fresh and preventing fading, even in hot conditions.
- Maintains Original Look & Feel: Designed to leave a completely invisible layer that doesn't alter the look or feel of soft leather trim.
- Protects from Contaminants: Effectively shields against dirt, sweat, salt, and fats, preventing them from penetrating the surface.

Simple Steps to a Perfect Finish:
1. Prepare: Start by thoroughly cleaning the leather surface to ensure a strong, lasting bond.
2. Apply: Apply a small amount of product to a soft microfiber cloth or applicator.
3. Wipe: Rub evenly into the surface of the leather and wipe off any excess if necessary.

Pro Tip: This is the number one choice for older, used leather upholstery as it doesn't require a perfect, brand-new surface to provide effective protection and dirt repellency.

Product Specifications:
- Durability: >3 months
- Surfaces: All Leather Types
- pH Level: Neutral
- Available Sizes: 120ml and 500ml

With durability of about 3 months, Q2 LeatherCoat is the perfect regular use car leather protectant to protect from liquids, sweat, dirt and also dye transfer from jeans and clothing that can discolor and stain leather.

HIGHLY PROTECTIVE:
Just one layer of Q LeatherCoat ensures a high level of protection as the coating itself is hydrophobic and repels both liquids and dirt. This car leather protectant also provides strong protection against UV rays, allowing you to keep the freshness of colors for a long time, even in hot and sunny conditions. Q LeatherCoat is designed to protect leather from dirt, sweat, salt and fats. Its hydrophobic properties and strong bonding to the surface help to protect against pollutants that may penetrate the structure of your trim.

MATTE FINISH:
As most modern interior automotive leather has a factory matte finish, we made sure that Q LeatherCoat leather coating leaves an invisible layer that does not affect the look or feel of the soft leather trim in any way. This car leather protectant simply coats the leather to ensure its good looks remain the same as the day you bought it.

PRO TIP:
Q LeatherCoat is the number #1 choice on older, used leather upholstery. Unlike Q LeatherShield, it doesn't require the perfect and like new condition of the upholstery to provide protection and effective dirt repellency.
